metadata.title: EU-Scan — Check If a Website Uses EU Services | switch-to.eu
metadata.description: Analyze any website to check if it uses EU-based services and is GDPR compliant.

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Tools to help you switch to EU services

euScan.title: EU-Scan
euScan.description: Analyze a website to check if it's EU-based

websiteAnalyzer.pageTitle: Check how EU-friendly your website is
websiteAnalyzer.invalidUrlError: Please enter a valid website URL
websiteAnalyzer.emptyStateDescription: See which third-party services your website uses and whether they're based in the EU.

step1.title: Enter Your Website URL
step1.description: Type or paste the domain you want to check.

step2.title: Instant Domain Check
step2.description: The scan detects third-party services and checks where they're based.

step3.title: View Results
step3.description: See what your site uses, where each service is based, and what EU alternatives exist.

websiteAnalyzer.ctaDescription: Browse EU-based alternatives and follow step-by-step migration guides to switch over.

results.congratulations: Congratulations! Your website is using 100% EU-based services.

domainNotFound.title: Domain Not Found
domainNotFound.message: We couldn't find the domain {domain}. Please check if the domain exists or try another one.

recommendations.switchToEu: Consider switching to an EU-based alternative.
recommendations.checkAlternatives: Check our EU alternatives directory for options.

analyze.checkingAspects: We're checking various aspects of this domain. This might take a moment.
